prose:
**Nitrobenzene Fukui reactivity result** — computed with chemkit `fukui-reactivity` using DFT, tier `standard` with **B3LYP/def2-TZVP** as reported by the tool (`method`: `b3lyp/def2-tzvp`), **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied fixed XYZ file `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/nitrobenzene/nitrobenzene.xyz` (14 atoms). The Fukui indices were computed from Mulliken charges (`partial_charges_scheme`: `Mulliken (PySCF)`) for neutral, cationic, and anionic charge states; cation charge/multiplicity = +1/2, anion charge/multiplicity = −1/2.

Headline result: the **most electrophilic site** is atom **4** (1-based label), **C**, with **f+ = 0.49641783**. The most nucleophilic site is atom **5** (1-based label), **C**, with **f− = 0.1072882**.

Per-atom Fukui indices from the tool:

| atom label | element | f+ | f− | f0 | dual descriptor |
|---:|:---:|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| 1 | O | 0.47317276 | 0.097015524 | 0.28509414 | 0.37615724 |
| 2 | O | 0.47344363 | 0.096773921 | 0.28510877 | 0.37666971 |
| 3 | N | -0.45670088 | 0.017243458 | -0.21972871 | -0.47394434 |
| 4 | C | 0.49641783 | -0.014292037 | 0.24106289 | 0.51070986 |
| 5 | C | 0.11562652 | 0.1072882 | 0.11145736 | 0.0083383195 |
| 6 | C | 0.11588206 | 0.10723661 | 0.11155933 | 0.0086454561 |
| 7 | C | 0.17412422 | 0.094922441 | 0.13452333 | 0.079201782 |
| 8 | C | 0.1742294 | 0.094892499 | 0.13456095 | 0.079336898 |
| 9 | C | 0.28913575 | 0.0083116096 | 0.14872368 | 0.28082414 |
| 10 | H | -0.2316897 | 0.075212029 | -0.078238834 | -0.30690173 |
| 11 | H | -0.23181693 | 0.075202557 | -0.078307185 | -0.30701948 |
| 12 | H | -0.13372477 | 0.083883283 | -0.024920743 | -0.21760805 |
| 13 | H | -0.13379393 | 0.083881905 | -0.024956012 | -0.21767583 |
| 14 | H | -0.12430597 | 0.072428004 | -0.025938984 | -0.19673398 |

Warnings: no warning messages were returned by the tool result. Integrity verdict: `trustworthy = true` (`status`: `ok`). Integrity checks reported charge conservation for f+ and f− as OK: `sum(f+) = 1.0000` and `sum(f-) = 1.0000`.

Reproducibility: chemkit reported CLI invocation `/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py fukui --method dft --charge 0 --mult 1 --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/nitrobenzene/nitrobenzene.xyz --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmp__h_ovll/live.json`. Plot written to `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/fukui-reactivity-validation/nitrobenzene/argo_gpt-5.5/20260706-183431_nitrobenzene_fukui_reactivity/agent_call_01_plot.png`. A live `.out` log path was not included in the chemkit result returned to me, so I cannot report a specific `.out` path without fabricating one.
